mapper.select: /* ReuseRipMgmtMapper.getContractInfo */ SELECT REQ.REQUEST_KEY ,SUB.CONTRACT_NUM ,SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME ,FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM --,SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM ,REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM ,REQ.OPER_TYPE_NM /*업무구분 */ --,(SELECT RIP FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = REQ.REQUEST_KEY) RIP /*신청IP*/ ,REQ.LST_RATE_CD ,SUB.SUB_STATUS FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} AND ROWNUM = 1
/* ReuseRipMgmtMapper.getReuseRipCt */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_REUSE_IP_MST A WHERE A.RIP = (SELECT RIP FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey})
